scene_title: Pergaminho medieval com bestas e anjos
narrative_beat: Mao profética segurando rolo com texto latino

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid open medieval parchment scroll with crimson and gold Latin text and ornate illuminated borders depicting beasts and angels, held by golden-gloved prophetic hand in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the ornate illuminated borders with beasts and angels in crimson and gold
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated modern technology laboratory with dark screens and empty work tables in background

environment.location: ruined monastic library meets modern tech lab

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, warm highlights, Caravaggio grading

mood.emotion: ancient text meeting its fulfillment in modernity

symbolism.primary: the scroll as contract that technology is now executing

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
